title: Rotary pin finally arrives from Illinois
description: PLETTENBEG BAY NEWS – The Paul Harris...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBEG BAY NEWS – The Paul Harris Rotary award certificate and pin are finally in the possession of Otto Olivier, the latest recipient.","html":"PLETTENBEG BAY NEWS – The Paul Harris Rotary award certificate and pin are finally in the possession of Otto Olivier, the latest recipient."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Olivier was in hospital undergoing a double knee replacement operation when the initial award was made to him by the Plettenberg Bay Rotary Club and could not receive it in person."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At the time, the official pin and certifi-cate had not yet arrived from Rotary headquarters in Illinois, USA – so after they were received, a special ceremony was arranged to hand them over to Olivier on Tuesday 26 August.","html":"At the time, the official pin and certifi-cate had not yet arrived from Rotary headquarters in Illinois, USA – so after they were received, a special ceremony was arranged to hand them over to Olivier on Tuesday 26 August."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Service above selfThe citation reads that Olivier followed to the letter the Rotary International principles of service above self.","html":"Service above self
The citation reads that Olivier followed to the letter the Rotary International principles of service above self."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Olivier, head of operations at the Plettenberg Bay Crime Prevention Association (PBCPA), has a dream of making Plett the safest place to live in.","html":"Olivier, head of operations at the Plettenberg Bay Crime Prevention Association (PBCPA), has a dream of making Plett the safest place to live in."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Tricia Wylde, Plettenberg Bay Rotary Club president, said the club was honoured to have a Paul Harris Fellow of Olivier's calibre. \"He ensures that we in Plettenberg Bay can live safely in our beautiful town,\" said Wilde.","html":"Tricia Wylde, Plettenberg Bay Rotary Club president, said the club was honoured to have a Paul Harris Fellow of Olivier's calibre. \"He ensures that we in Plettenberg Bay can live safely in our beautiful town,\" said Wilde."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read previous article:","html":"Read previous article:"},{"type":"list","items":["Top Rotary award for Olivier"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Rotary pin finally arrives from Illinois
